nasb.text: Now when the wall was rebuilt and I had set up the doors, and the gatekeepers and the singers and the Levites were appointed,

esv.text: Now when the wall had been built and I had set up the doors, and the gatekeepers, the singers, and the Levites had been appointed,

cnv.text: 城牆建成後，我就裝上門扇，委派了守門的、歌唱者和利未人，

ccb.text: 城墙建完、门扇安好、歌乐手和利未人都已指派妥当后，
